title: poa pilosissima
intro: Poa pilosissima, also known as hairy meadow-grass, is a species of grass native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Poa pilosissima include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of Poa pilosissima can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and relieve respiratory discomfort.
